name: docflow
description: ADR-driven documentation workflow: a bootstrap skill that scaffolds an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) catalogue, a plan/ queue, AGENTS.md conventions, and _agent/ coordination — plus lifecycle skills to author ADRs, queue and ship work, add conventions, audit consistency, brainstorm decisions, run agent waves, and roll up a multi-repo product's catalogues. Scales from one repo to a multi-repo federation. Works on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, pi, Codex, and OpenCode.
